Container.Name: abs-rename
Container.Overview: Local audiobook metadata lookup and file organizer for Audiobookshelf. Scans .m4b and .mp3 files, matches them against the Audible catalog, previews renamed paths, copies/organizes M4B files, and hands off MP3 files for external conversion.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the ABS Rename web interface.

Config.Name: App Data (Database)
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database. Map to a persistent appdata path so scan history survives container restarts.

Config.Name: Source Folder
Config.Description: Root folder containing your .m4b and/or .mp3 files. Read-write is needed for delete-after functionality.

Config.Name: Output / Destination
Config.Description: Where organized copies are written. You can point this at your live ABS library once you're happy with the results.

Config.Name: Output Folder (Env)
Config.Description: Container path where organized files are written (corresponds to the Output / Destination volume mount)

Config.Name: AudNexus Region
Config.Description: Audible/AudNexus region for metadata lookups. Options: us, uk, au, ca, de, fr, it, es, jp, in

Config.Name: API Request Delay (ms)
Config.Description: Milliseconds to wait between AudNexus API calls. Increase if you see rate-limit errors.

Config.Name: MP3 Hand-off Folder (Path)
Config.Description: Where MP3 files are moved (renamed) for external converter container to pick up.

Config.Name: MP3 Hand-off Folder (Env)
Config.Description: Container path for MP3 hand-off (must match the Path above). Leave blank to disable MP3 hand-off feature.

Config.Name: Match MP3 Files
Config.Description: Whether to match MP3s via AudNexus and show in results (like M4B). If false, MP3s are not processed.
